      have : (V(G, M_I)).encard ≤ 2 * M_I.encard := by
        rw [← two_mul, ← encard_sum_add_encard_compl_inter]
        simp [hM_I.degree_le_one]
      have : 2 * M_I.encard ≤ 2 * ν(G) := by
        refine mul_le_mul_left' (hM_I.encard_le _) _
      have : 2 * ν(G) = (V(G, M_B)).encard := by
        rw [← two_mul, ← hM_B.encard, ← encard_sum_add_encard_compl_inter]
        simp [hM_B.degree_le_one]
      have : (V(G, M_B)).encard ≥ B.encard := encard_mono hBsub
      linarith) (by infer_instance)
    use M_I ∆ E(P)
    constructor
    · exact hP.augment
    · intro y hy
      cases' hy with hyI hyx
      · have : y ∈ V(G, M_I) := hIsub hyI
        have : y ∈ V(G, M_I ∆ E(P)) := hP.augment_vertex_subset this
        exact this
      · subst hyx
        exact hP.last_mem

intro I B hI hnotmax hBmax
    obtain ⟨M_I, hM_I, hI_sub⟩ := hI
    have hnotmax' : ¬ G.IsMaxMatching M_I := by
      intro hmax
      apply hnotmax
      intro J hJ
      obtain ⟨M_J, hM_J, hJ_sub⟩ := hJ
      have : J.encard ≤ M_I.encard * 2 := by
        calc
          J.encard ≤ V(G, M_J).encard := encard_mono hJ_sub
          _ = M_J.encard * 2 := by rw [V_encard_eq_of_isMatching hM_J]
          _ ≤ M_I.encard * 2 := by gcongr; exact hmax.max M_J hM_J
      have : I.encard ≤ M_I.encard * 2 := by
        calc
          I.encard ≤ V(G, M_I).encard := encard_mono hI_sub
          _ = M_I.encard * 2 := by rw [V_encard_eq_of_isMatching hM_I]
      have : J.encard ≤ I.encard := by
        apply le_of_not_gt
        intro hgt
        have : M_I.encard < M_J.encard := by
          nlinarith
        have : ∃ P, G.IsAugPath hM_I P := by
          apply IsMatching.exists_isAugPath_not_max hM_I (by simpa using hmax.not_maximal_of_lt this)
        obtain ⟨P, hP⟩ := this
        have hM_I' : G.IsMatching (M_I ∆ E(P)) := hP.augment
        have hI_sub' : I ⊆ V(G, M_I ∆ E(P)) := by
          calc
            I ⊆ V(G, M_I) := hI_sub
            _ ⊆ V(G, M_I ∆ E(P)) := hP.augment_vertex_subset
        have hcard : (M_I ∆ E(P)).encard = M_I.encard + 1 := hP.augment_encard
        have hJ_sub' : J ⊆ V(G, M_J) := by
          obtain ⟨M_J, hM_J, hJ_sub⟩ := hJ
          exact hJ_sub
        have : J.encard ≤ (M_I.encard + 1) * 2 := by
          calc
            J.encard ≤ V(G, M_J).encard := encard_mono hJ_sub'
            _ = M_J.encard * 2 := by rw [V_encard_eq_of_isMatching hM_J]
            _ ≤ (M_I.encard + 1) * 2 := by gcongr; linarith
        linarith
      exact this
    obtain ⟨M_B, hM_B, hB_sub⟩ := hBmax.out
    have hB_max : G.IsMaxMatching M_B := by
      apply IsMatching.isMaxMatching_of_vertex_subset hM_B
      intro v hv
      have : v ∈ B := by simpa using hv
      exact hB_sub this
    have hcard_B : M_B.encard = ν(G) := IsMaxMatching.encard hB_max
    have hcard_I : M_I.encard < ν(G) := by
      contrapose! hnotmax'
      apply IsMaxMatching.mk hM_I
      intro M' hM'
      calc
        M'.encard ≤ ν(G) := IsMatching.encard_le hM'
        _ = M_I.encard := by rw [← hnotmax']
        _ ≤ M_I.encard := le_rfl
    have : ∃ P, G.IsAugPath hM_I P := by
      apply IsMatching.exists_isAugPath_not_max hM_I (by simpa using hnotmax')
    obtain ⟨P, hP⟩ := this
    have hM_I' : G.IsMatching (M_I ∆ E(P)) := hP.augment
    have hI_sub' : I ⊆ V(G, M_I ∆ E(P)) := by
      calc
        I ⊆ V(G, M_I) := hI_sub
        _ ⊆ V(G, M_I ∆ E(P)) := hP.augment_vertex_subset
    have hfirst : P.first ∉ V(G, M_I) := hP.first_not_in
    have hlast : P.last ∉ V(G, M_I) := hP.last_not_in
    have hfirst_in_B : P.first ∈ B ∨ P.last ∈ B := by
      have hB_cover : B ⊆ V(G, M_B) := hB_sub
      have hB_maximal : ∀ x ∈ V(G), x ∉ B → ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ B ⊆ V(G, M) ∧ x ∉ V(G, M) := by
        intro x hx hxB
        exact hBmax.maximal (by simp_all)
      have hP_vertices : V(G, E(P)) ⊆ V(G) := by
        intro v hv
        obtain ⟨e, he, hv⟩ := hv
        exact (G.edge_incidence e).snd hv
      have hP_endpoints : P.first ∈ V(G, E(P)) ∧ P.last ∈ V(G, E(P)) := by
        cases P with
        | nil u => simp_all
        | cons u e w => simp_all
      have hP_endpoints_B : P.first ∈ B ∨ P.last ∈ B := by
        by_contra! h
        have hfirst_not_B : P.first ∉ B := h.1
        have hlast_not_B : P.last ∉ B := h.2
        have hfirst_matchable : ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ B ⊆ V(G, M) ∧ P.first ∉ V(G, M) := hB_maximal P.first (by simpa using hP_endpoints.1) hfirst_not_B
        have hlast_matchable : ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ B ⊆ V(G, M) ∧ P.last ∉ V(G, M) := hB_maximal P.last (by simpa using hP_endpoints.2) hlast_not_B
        obtain ⟨M1, hM1, hB1, hfirst1⟩ := hfirst_matchable
        obtain ⟨M2, hM2, hB2, hlast2⟩ := hlast_matchable
        have hM1_max : G.IsMaxMatching M1 := by
          apply IsMatching.isMaxMatching_of_vertex_subset hM1
          intro v hv
          have : v ∈ B := by simpa using hv
          exact hB1 this
        have hM2_max : G.IsMaxMatching M2 := by
          apply IsMatching.isMaxMatching_of_vertex_subset hM2
          intro v hv
          have : v ∈ B := by simpa using hv
          exact hB2 this
        have hM1_card : M1.encard = ν(G) := IsMaxMatching.encard hM1_max
        have hM2_card : M2.encard = ν(G) := IsMaxMatching.encard hM2_max
        have hM_I_card : M_I.encard < ν(G) := hcard_I
        have hM_I'_card : (M_I ∆ E(P)).encard = M_I.encard + 1 := hP.augment_encard
        have hM_I'_le : (M_I ∆ E(P)).encard ≤ ν(G) := IsMatching.encard_le hM_I'
        linarith
      exact hP_endpoints_B
    cases hfirst_in_B with
    | inl hfirst_B =>
      use P.first, by simp_all
      use M_I ∆ E(P), hM_I'
      simp_all
    | inr hlast_B =>
      use P.last, by simp_all
      use M_I ∆ E(P), hM_I'
      simp_all

intro I B hI hnotmax hBmax
    obtain ⟨M_I, hM_I, hI_sub⟩ := hI
    obtain ⟨M_B, hM_B, hB_sub⟩ := hBmax
    have hIB : I.encard < B.encard := by
      contrapose! hnotmax
      apply maximal_of_encard_ge
      exact hI
      intro J hJ
      obtain ⟨M_J, hM_J, hJ_sub⟩ := hJ
      calc
        J.encard ≤ (V(G, M_J)).encard := encard_mono hJ_sub
        _ ≤ 2 * M_J.encard := by
          have : (V(G, M_J)).encard ≤ 2 * M_J.encard := by
            calc
              (V(G, M_J)).encard = ⨆ e ∈ M_J, (V(G, e)).encard := by
                rw [V_union_eq]
              _ ≤ ⨆ e ∈ M_J, 2 := by
                apply encard_iSup_le
                intro e he
                have : (V(G, e)).encard ≤ 2 := by
                  cases' G.e_mem_iff.mp (hM_J.subset he) with u v
                  · simp
                  · simp [*]
                exact this
              _ = 2 * M_J.encard := by simp [encard_nsmul]
          exact this
        _ ≤ 2 * ν(G) := by
          apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left
          · exact hM_J.encard_le
          · exact zero_le _
        _ = (V(G, M_B)).encard := by
          rw [← hM_B.encard, ← two_mul, ← V_encard_le_two_mul_encard hM_B]
          apply le_antisymm
          · apply V_encard_le_two_mul_encard
          · apply le_of_encard_le
            calc
              (V(G, M_B)).encard ≤ 2 * M_B.encard := V_encard_le_two_mul_encard hM_B
              _ = 2 * ν(G) := by rw [hM_B.encard]
    obtain ⟨P, hP⟩ := hM_I.exists_isAugPath_not_max (by
      intro h
      apply hnotmax
      apply maximal_of_encard_ge hI
      intro J hJ
      obtain ⟨M_J, hM_J, hJ_sub⟩ := hJ
      calc
        J.encard ≤ (V(G, M_J)).encard := encard_mono hJ_sub
        _ ≤ 2 * M_J.encard := by
          have : (V(G, M_J)).encard ≤ 2 * M_J.encard := by
            calc
              (V(G, M_J)).encard = ⨆ e ∈ M_J, (V(G, e)).encard := by
                rw [V_union_eq]
              _ ≤ ⨆ e ∈ M_J, 2 := by
                apply encard_iSup_le
                intro e he
                have : (V(G, e)).encard ≤ 2 := by
                  cases' G.e_mem_iff.mp (hM_J.subset he) with u v
                  · simp
                  · simp [*]
                exact this
              _ = 2 * M_J.encard := by simp [encard_nsmul]
          exact this
        _ ≤ 2 * ν(G) := by
          apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left
          · exact hM_J.encard_le
          · exact zero_le _
        _ = (V(G, M_B)).encard := by
          rw [← hM_B.encard, ← two_mul, ← V_encard_le_two_mul_encard hM_B]
          apply le_antisymm
          · apply V_encard_le_two_mul_encard
          · apply le_of_encard_le
            calc
              (V(G, M_B)).encard ≤ 2 * M_B.encard := V_encard_le_two_mul_encard hM_B
              _ = 2 * ν(G) := by rw [hM_B.encard])
    use P.last
    constructor
    · intro h
      apply hP.last_not_in
      apply hI_sub
      exact h
    · use M_I ∆ E(P)
      constructor
      · exact hP.augment
      · intro x hx
        cases' hx with hx hx
        · apply hI_sub
          exact hx
        · subst hx
          apply hP.augment_vertex_subset
          apply hI_sub
          exact hI_sub hx

intro I B hI hnotmax hBmax
    obtain ⟨M_I, hM_I, hIsub⟩ := hI
    have hnotmax' : ¬ G.IsMaxMatching M_I := by
      intro hmax
      apply hnotmax
      intro J hJ
      obtain ⟨M_J, hM_J, hJsub⟩ := hJ
      have : J.encard ≤ M_J.encard * 2 := by
        calc
          J.encard ≤ V(G, M_J).encard := encard_mono hJsub
          _ = M_J.encard * 2 := by
            rw [V_encard_eq_of_isMatching hM_J]
      have : M_J.encard ≤ M_I.encard := hmax.max M_J hM_J
      calc
        J.encard ≤ M_J.encard * 2 := this
        _ ≤ M_I.encard * 2 := by gcongr
        _ = V(G, M_I).encard := by

        _ ≥ I.encard := encard_mono hIsub
    obtain ⟨P, hP⟩ := IsMatching.exists_isAugPath_not_max hM_I hnotmax' inferInstance
